chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Acquittal Appeal No.513 of 2023 _________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _________________________________________________________________ For orders on MA No.12159/2025. 24-03-2026 None present. x-x-x-x-x-x On 12.05.2025 the appeal was dismissed because learned counsel for the appellant remained absent on five consecutive dates of hearing. Learned counsel filed an application for restoring the appeal, which is yet to be admitted, but he himself on 12.09.2025 sought adjournment. The case has been fixed again today and neither the counsel is present, nor any intimation is received. Restoration application (M.A. No.12159/2025) is dismissed for non- prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Farhan/PS
